text: What is the fundamental difference between listening and hearing?

options.text: Listening is conscious and hearing is mechanical
Listening is natural and hearing is physical
Listening is mechanical and hearing is normal
Listening is conscious and hearing is effortless

explanation: Hearing is a physiological process of detecting sound vibrations, whereas listening is a conscious, active process of interpreting and understanding those sounds. Effective communication requires listening, not just the physical act of hearing.
